title: No Elytra
description: A datapack that deletes the Elytra. Created for people that sees it as overpowered.
body:
### Salutations!

I’m okipiak, an amateur content creator. In this project, I’ve made it so you cannot get Elytra. Feel free to add this to your server.

## I created this datapack because I couldn't find anything like it elsewhere.

![No Elytra Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4663b270c29ba4c2346647a5de02ab816bcb1d45.png)

### ⚠️ !WARNING! ⚠️

**PLEASE USE VERSION 1.6+ OF THE DATAPACK!!! older versions won't work for long!**

## This datapack works on versions 1.13-1.21.11, although it will show that it is for older/newer version of the game.

**This datapack removes Elytra from the game and uses the `/kill` command to eliminate any Elytras found in item frames, ensuring compatibility with custom end ships. Additionally, it automatically deletes Elytras from players' inventories. However, this item removal feature can be toggled using commands:**

To enable automatic item deletion (default setting):

```
/scoreboard players set DeleteItems NoElytra 1
```


To disable automatic item deletion:

```
/scoreboard players set DeleteItems NoElytra 0
```


Please note that any value other than 0 or 1 will not have any effect.
